message:
fix: use workspace tree instead of parent tree in environment block

The parent tree scan (scanParentTree) dumped the working directory's
parent contents into the system prompt. When running under /tmp/,
this picked up thousands of experiment files, inflating subagent
prompts from ~10K to ~88K and confounding all local test results.

Replace with the workspace tree (ScanWorkspace) which only shows
the working directory contents. Remove scanParentTree entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
